channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KERNEX] Kernex Microsystems India Ltd Secures Rs. 91.12 Crore Order from Banaras Locomotive Works
item.description:
Kernex Microsystems India Ltd has been awarded an order from Banaras Locomotive Works for a value of Rs. 91.12 Crores (Incl. GST) for the Supply, Installation, Testing and Commissioning of 112 sets of On-board KAVACH Loco Equipment as per RDSO Specification No. RDSO/SPN/196/2020, Version 4.0 or latest. The order is to be executed on or before 15/02/2027.

  • Order value: Rs. 91.12 Crores (Incl. GST)
  • Supply, Installation, Testing and Commissioning of 112 sets of On-board KAVACH Loco Equipment
  • Order to be executed on or before 15/02/2027
  • Awarded by domestic entity: Banaras Locomotive Works
  • Does not fall under related party transactions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KERNEX MICROSYSTEMS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [UML] Umiya Mobile Ltd Clarifies Price Movement Compliance with SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Umiya Mobile Ltd has provided a clarification letter regarding a query raised by BSE on price movement. The company has been complying with provisions of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 by disclosing all necessary events, information, and price sensitive information. There is no pending information or announcement that may have a bearing on the price movement behavior of the company's security. The company does not comment on the price movement as it is market driven.

  • Umiya Mobile Ltd has clarified price movement query raised by BSE
  • Company has been complying with SEBI Regulation 30 by disclosing all necessary events and price sensitive information
  • No pending information or announcement from the Company affecting price movement
  • Company does not comment on price movement as it is market driven

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Umiya Mobile Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [NOIDATOLL] IL&FS Transportation Networks Limited Holds 26.37% Stake in Noida Toll Bridge Company Limited as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
IL&FS Transportation Networks Limited, a prominent entity in the transportation sector, has declared its holding in Noida Toll Bridge Company Limited. As of March 31, 2026, IL&FS Transportation Networks Limited holds 4,90,95,007 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, representing 26.37% of the total shares in Noida Toll Bridge Company Limited. The entity has declared that none of these shares have been under encumbrance during the Financial Year ended March 31, 2026.

  • IL&FS Transportation Networks Limited holds 26.37% stake in Noida Toll Bridge Company Limited
  • The holding is based on 4,90,95,007 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each
  • No shares have been under encumbrance during the Financial Year ended March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NOIDA TOLL BRIDGE COMPANY LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [ZAGGLE] Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd: Appointment of Interim CFO and Resignation of CFO
item.description:
Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and the appointment of Mr. Rajesh Tummalaganti as Interim CFO. The changes will be effective from April 4, 2026. Mr. Tummalaganti is a certified member of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with over 20 years of experience in finance, governance, risk management, and regulatory compliance.

  • Resignation of Mr. Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi as CFO of Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd.
  • Appointment of Mr. Rajesh Tummalaganti as Interim CFO of Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd.
  • Mr. Tummalaganti is a certified member of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with over 20 years of experience.
  • Changes to take effect from April 4, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZAGGLE] Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd: New Interim CFO Appointed After Departure of Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi
item.description:
Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi, effective April 3, 2026. The company has appointed Mr. Rajesh Tummalaganti as the Interim Chief Financial Officer with effect from April 4, 2026, until a new CFO is appointed. Mr. Tummalaganti is a certified member of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with over 20 years of experience in finance, governance, risk management, and regulatory compliance.

  • Resignation of Mr. Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi as Chief Financial Officer of Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd.
  • Appointment of Mr. Rajesh Tummalaganti as Interim Chief Financial Officer of the company.
  • Mr. Tummalaganti is a certified member of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with over 20 years of experience.
  • The appointment is effective from April 4, 2026, until a new CFO is appointed.
  • Mr. Tummalaganti has experience in financial governance, risk management, investor relations, and regulatory compliance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ZAGGLE] Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd: New Interim CFO Appointed After Resignation of Mr. Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi
item.description:
Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi, effective April 3, 2026. The company has appointed Mr. Rajesh Tummalaganti as the Interim Chief Financial Officer with effect from April 4, 2026, until a new CFO is appointed. Mr. Tummalaganti is a certified member of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with over 20 years of experience in finance, governance, risk management, and regulatory compliance.

  • Resignation of Mr. Venkata Aditya Kumar Grandhi as Chief Financial Officer of Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd.
  • Appointment of Mr. Rajesh Tummalaganti as Interim Chief Financial Officer of the company.
  • Mr. Tummalaganti is a certified member of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with over 20 years of experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ZAGGLE] Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd. Drops Proposed Acquisition of Effiasoft Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd. has announced that it will not proceed with the proposed acquisition of 51% stake in Effiasoft Private Limited. The decision was made during a Board of Directors meeting held on April 3, 2026, after reassessing the strategic need for the acquisition.

  • Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd. has decided to abandon the proposed acquisition of Effiasoft Private Limited.
  • The decision was made during a Board of Directors meeting held on April 3, 2026.
  • The acquisition was a 51% stake in Effiasoft Private Limited.
  • The decision was made after reassessing the strategic need for the acquisition.
  • Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd. informed the stock exchange about the decision as per Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ROSSARI] Rossari Biotech Subsidiary to Sell Office Premises for ~ Rs. 10 Crores
item.description:
Rossari Biotech Ltd. has announced that its subsidiary, Unitop Chemicals Private Limited, will sell its office premises located at Saki Naka, Mumbai, for a consideration of approximately Rs. 10 crores. The proposed transaction is expected to be completed by the end of Q2 FY27. The sale will not have any impact on the Company’s or Subsidiary’s business operations as no business operations are conducted from the premises. The sale does not constitute the sale of an undertaking within the meaning of Section 180(1)(a) of the Companies Act, 2013. The details of the transaction will be provided on the execution of the agreement.

  • Rossari Biotech subsidiary to sell office premises for ~ Rs. 10 crores
  • Transaction expected to be completed by end of Q2 FY27
  • No impact on Company’s or Subsidiary’s business operations
  • Sale does not constitute the sale of an undertaking
  • Details of the transaction to be provided on execution of the agreement

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rossari Biotech Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [AUTOPRD] Automobile Products of India Ltd Approves Terms for Rights Issue of ₹14,00,000
item.description:
Automobile Products of India Ltd has approved the terms of a rights issue of equity shares worth ₹14,00,000. The rights issue will open on April 15, 2026, and close on April 24, 2026. The record date for the purpose of determining the equity shareholders entitled to receive the rights entitlement is April 9, 2026. The rights entitlement ratio is 19:10, and the rights issue price is ₹ 1/- per Equity Share. The company will call 100% of the issue price on the application stage itself.

  • Rights issue of ₹14,00,000 by Automobile Products of India Ltd
  • Rights issue opens on April 15, 2026, and closes on April 24, 2026
  • Record date set for April 9, 2026
  • Rights entitlement ratio is 19:10
  • Rights issue price is ₹ 1/- per Equity Share

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUTOMOBILE PRODUCTS OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [SKM] Chief Marketing Officer of SK Minerals & Additives Ltd Resigns Effective March 31, 2026
item.description:
SK Minerals & Additives Ltd has announced the resignation of its Chief Marketing Officer (CMO), Mr. Pawan Kumar Jain. The resignation was received on April 3, 2026, and will be effective from the closure of business hours on March 31, 2026. Mr. Jain's decision to resign is due to some unavoidable circumstances. The company has acknowledged his resignation and will initiate the necessary formalities.

  • Pawan Kumar Jain resigns from the position of CMO of SK Minerals & Additives Ltd.
  • The resignation will be effective from the closure of business hours on March 31, 2026.
  • Mr. Jain's decision is due to some unavoidable circumstances.
  • The company has acknowledged the resignation and will initiate necessary formalities.
  • The resignation is in compliance with Regulation 30 read with Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SK Minerals & Additives Ltd | Category: Management Change
